author: operator42
text: High Signal's daily brief is useful, but I cannot tell which recommendations came from Reddit versus SEC filings.

author: founder_ops
text: The product ideas are strong. I want a source trail and confidence score before I send them to my team.

author: research-lead
text: AlphaSense feels polished for enterprise research, but it is priced and packaged for big teams.

author: growth_pm
text: Perplexity citations are easy to inspect, but it does not turn repeated complaints into a product backlog.

author: design-partner
text: Pricing should stay simple. I would pay for a monthly competitor perception report if it gives specific copy and roadmap changes.
